## Summary

Briefly describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Related issues

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or mechanic
- [ ] New level(s)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] I followed the coding standards in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] I kept the engine (`src/engine`, `src/ai`) free of DOM/global state
- [ ] I updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] New gameplay is accessible (keyboard + not color-only) and respects reduced-motion

## Screenshots / recordings

If this changes the UI or gameplay, include a before/after.
